summary.intent: Monitor PR #90 (bun dependency update to v1.3.12) for CI failures and review comments, automatically fixing issues and pushing corrections.
summary.outcome: CI failure was identified and fixed — bun 1.3.12 changed global binary PATH resolution causing `claude` command not found; the validate-plugin.yaml workflow was patched and committed.

repo: commitlint.config.mjs defines a scope-enum that includes 'claude' as a valid scope
The repo uses conventional commits enforced via commitlint
PR #90 is a Renovate-generated dependency update on branch deps-renovate-bun-1.x in ronnnnn/cc

code.finding: Workflow relied on bun global binary PATH resolution that changed in bun 1.3.12; `bun install -g` no longer puts binaries on PATH automatically in CI — required explicit PATH fix

workflow: bun 1.3.12 changed how `bun install -g` resolves global binary paths, breaking CI workflows that call globally installed binaries like `claude` directly
PR monitoring was scripted at /tmp/pr-monitor-90.sh polling every 60 seconds for CI failures and review comments
CI run IDs can be used directly to scope failure investigation via subagents

friction: bun 1.3.12 introduced a breaking change in global binary PATH resolution that was not documented in the PR description, requiring CI failure investigation to discover
commit scope validation required reading commitlint.config.mjs to confirm 'claude' was an allowed scope before committing
open_items: Verify CI passes after the workflow PATH fix is pushed
Monitor for any additional review comments on PR #90 that may require follow-up
